description: Post-review fixes: hybrid auth utility for Bearer token support, JWT payload improvements, orders route hybrid auth, and manifest.json metadata fix.
steps: Create lib/flutter-auth-session.ts with getSessionOrBearer(request) utility that tries NextAuth auth() first, then falls back to verifying Bearer token from Authorization header using jsonwebtoken, checking user isActive/passwordVersion/authVersion from DB
Update app/api/flutter-auth/route.ts to include passwordVersion and authVersion in the JWT payload
Update app/api/orders/route.ts to use getSessionOrBearer instead of auth() directly
Fix msm_app/web/manifest.json: update name, short_name, background_color, theme_color, and description
acceptance_criteria: lib/flutter-auth-session.ts exports getSessionOrBearer(request: Request) that returns session-compatible object or null
The hybrid auth tries auth() first, then falls back to Bearer token verification
Bearer token verification checks isActive, passwordVersion, and authVersion against the DB
flutter-auth route includes passwordVersion and authVersion in JWT payload
orders route uses getSessionOrBearer instead of auth()
manifest.json has name='MSM Supermarket', short_name='MSM', background_color='#FF6600', theme_color='#FF6600'
verification: Run: cd /projects/sandbox/revathysupermarket && npx tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck lib/flutter-auth-session.ts || echo 'TypeScript check done'
